info.name: Labels
info.description:
Once a parcel has been announced, you can use the **Labels API** to request a PDF shipping label in order to print it and attach it to the box.

Contact Support:
 Name: Sendcloud API Support
 Email: contact@sendcloud.com

item.name: Retrieve a label for a specific parcel

request.description: You will receive URLs to download the labels in PDF format, for both normal and label printers. You can get the `id` of a parcel from the [Create a parcel or parcels](/api/v2/parcels/create-a-parcel-or-parcels) endpoint.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description:
(Required) The position of the label on an A4 page.

0 - Top left
1 - Top right
2 - Bottom left
3 - Bottom right
